series_metadata.series_description: This record is the meeting minutes related to the Credit Union Council, which meets at least once every six (6) months as required by Ohio Revised Code 1733.329.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, transfer to State Archives. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for two (2) years from date of meeting, then destroy., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Erase
